<<<KOT:postmodernist>>>>
{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"postmodernist names a philosophical-cultural stance defined by rejection of grand narratives, skepticism toward universal truth, and claims about the socially constructed nature of knowledge. These are not grounded in perception, bodily action, concrete artefacts, or simple relations expressible in the prime lexicon. The concept requires meta-level discourse about meaning and epistemology that lies outside the scope of kernel primitives."}
<<<END:postmodernist>>>>
